ns0:entry.ns0:title: 0x7c13/Notepads
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/0x7c13/Notepads
Language: c%23
A modern, lightweight text editor with a minimalist design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AIDotNet/OpenDeepWiki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AIDotNet/OpenDeepWiki
Language: c%23
OpenDeepWiki is the open-source version of the DeepWiki project, aiming to provide a powerful knowledge management and collaboration platform. The project is mainly developed using C# and TypeScript, supporting modular design, and is easy to expand and customize.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ArduPilot/MissionPlanner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ArduPilot/MissionPlanner
Language: c%23
Mission Planner Ground Control Station for ArduPilot (c# .net)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The future of .NET UI

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BigheadSMZ/Zelda-LA-DX-HD-Updated
Language: c%23
Windows, Android, and Linux ports of TLoZ: LADXHD updated via a patcher.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Flow-Launcher/Flow.Launcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Flow-Launcher/Flow.Launcher
Language: c%23

URL: https://github.com/Tyrrrz/YoutubeDownloader
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Unity-Technologies/ml-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Unity-Technologies/ml-agents
Language: c%23
The Unity Machine Learning Agents Toolkit (ML-Agents) is an open-source project that enables games and simulations to serve as environments for training intelligent agents using deep reinforcement learning and imitation learning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aelassas/servy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aelassas/servy
Language: c%23
Professional-Grade Windows Service Wrapper with Deep Observability - Modern Alternative to NSSM, WinSW & FireDaemon Pro

ns0:entry.ns0:title: files-community/Files
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/files-community/Files
Language: c%23
A modern file manager that helps users organize their files and folders.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
Language: c%23
Secure, cross-platform Git credential storage with authentication to GitHub, Azure Repos, and other popular Git hosting services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitextensions/gitextensions
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions
Language: c%23
Git Extensions is a standalone UI tool for managing git repositories. It also integrates with Windows Explorer and Microsoft Visual Studio (2015/2017/2019).
